elements.description: generic short-column detail, rises from ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 to ระดับชานพัก (stair landing level) per the sheet note

notes_text: เลา CN ขึ้นจากระดับชั้น 1 ถึงระดับชานพัก
warnings: C1 and C2 are the only marks that continue all the way into the roof structure (โครงหลังคา row shows an arrow), while C0/C1A/C2A terminate no later than eave level -- consistent with C1/C2 being the primary interior column line supporting the rafters (matches S-07's roof plan, where rafters run at grid1-4 positions), and C0/C1A/C2A being shorter perimeter/edge columns.

C2A/C2's pedestal reinforcement is a mixed bar-size cage (4-Ø16mm + 4-Ø12mm) rather than a uniform single diameter -- transcribed as printed, flagged for human confirmation given the unusual mixed-diameter cage is easy to misread.

C1A's continuation pattern (arrow at floor2/eave level with no explicit new section box, meaning it keeps the same 150x150/4-Ø12mm section as C1/C2A/C2 without a separately printed box) is a reasonable inference but not 100% explicit on this sheet -- flagged for human review.
